scripts.build: node -e "require('node:fs').rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true })" && tsc -p tsconfig.json
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @massion/runtime exec tsc -p tsconfig.json && pnpm --filter @massion/work exec tsc -p tsconfig.json && vitest run src
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @massion/runtime exec tsc -p tsconfig.json && pnpm --filter @massion/work exec tsc -p tsconfig.json && tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit
